title: balling Coulubian Dexluxe
description:
A mod made from mcreator

FOR FORGE

this mod adds new weapons,
tools, items, potions, mobs and much more

Its also ver cursed
body:
**A PLAUGE HAS INFECTED YOUR WORLD WITH CURSED (I mean very cursed) MOBS, TOOLS , ITEMS** **AND MORE YOUR GOAL IS TO CRAFT THE FINAL LATE LATE GAME ITEM**

 **GOOD LUCK TO CRAFT THE ULTIMATE ITEM**




This mod is created in mcreator and adds new weapons, crafting recipes, mobs, items, and a new op craft that is very late game.

This was made in about 2~ weeks.

WARNING YOUR GAME MAY LAG

I suggest you use JEI or [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) for the crafting recipes.

It is also VERY CURSED


This mod adds blood crafting, ridiculous grindy items, op weapons, and 2 very very very late game items

This mod is purely a joke and it's fun to play with friends




There is also a wiki on blood crafting to get you some earlyish~ game stuff
